prompt: 我有一张产品图（一款白色陶瓷咖啡杯），想做一个 10 秒的产品展示广告。需要从纯黑背景中旋转出场，展示杯身纹理细节，最后杯中倒入热咖啡冒出蒸汽。横屏 16:9，极简高级感。产品正面图作为 @图片1，杯身纹理细节图作为 @图片2。
assertions: Correctly references @图片1 and @图片2 with proper usage
Uses basic structure (<=12s) not timestamp storyboard
Includes Orbit or rotation camera movement for product showcase
Includes Zoom In for texture detail
Includes material reference list mapping @图片N to asset descriptions
Does not include realistic human face content
